about.title: About Us — The Meta-Unicorn Engine
about.description: Discover the commercial vision and core engineering principles driving Nebutra Intelligence.
about.heading: The Era of Super Individuals
about.subheading: Terminate human-wave bureaucratic expansion. Equip the creative super individual with maximal algorithmic leverage.
about.missionTitle: A New Order Resisting Administrative Decay
about.missionP1: Nebutra isolates itself as the world's foremost Meta-Unicorn ecosystem. Traditional corporate scale inevitably correlates with bureaucracy and entropy. We are ending that scale curse via absolute Code Governance. Our purpose is not just to hatch a few unicorns, but to architect a creator mother-engine crossing capital barricades and defeating entropy with flawless automated workflows.
about.missionP2: Commerce is merely the restructuring of production elements—but historically riddled with hierarchical frictions. In Nebutra's neural network, any independent builder shipping verifiable Proof of Work receives automatic routing of top talent, institutional trust, and algorithmic capital via our Sleptons matchmaker, democratizing entrepreneurship into a highly certain, standardized track.
about.missionP3: We fundamentally reject scaling by adding middle management. Agents handle 100% of operational workflows. We do not hire passive cogs; we invest in, cultivate, and elevate literal creators.

0.title: Infinite Fission (Philosophy)
0.description: Rejecting the bloated myth of horizontal expansion. Every micro-entity hatched here is designed to leverage billions in value with ultra-low headcount.

1.title: The Builder Core (Infrastructure)
1.description: Transcending simple boilerplates. An arsenal of enterprise multi-tenant isolation, automated MRR billing, shipped by solo founders in one week.

2.title: Frictionless Flow (Routing)
2.description: Algorithms dismantle HR and VC logic. Execution metrics and git commit velocity dictate purely where capital and talent flow.

3.title: Code is Law (Organization)
3.description: Eradicate office politics. Provide architectural proofs and the algorithms will automatically elevate your systemic authority.

about.jobsDescription: We ignore degrees and pedigrees. Pass the Sleptons machine vision and topological checks via sheer Proof of Work, and shape the ecosystem.
about.ctaDescription: Contact our engineering specialists for an enterprise integration assessment or review the deployment documentation.

faq.title: Engineering Guidance & FAQ — Nebutra
faq.description: Comprehensive analysis of framework architecture, baseline topologies, and commercial deployment strategies.
faq.heading: Executive Deep Dive
faq.subheading: Supporting material optimized for systems engineering integration and executive commercial decision-making.

0.q: What is the explicit operational purpose of Nebutra Sailor?
0.a: Nebutra Sailor is a highly structured, production-ready Next.js AI SaaS framework. It bundles microservice functionalities, including corporate billing, multi-factor authentication, and multi-tenant isolation, eliminating boilerplate development overhead and allowing teams to hyper-focus on core structural AI implementation.

1.q: How is the repository licensing structured?
1.a: The underlying infrastructure strictly enforces the OSS AGPLv3 agreement, guaranteeing transparency and zero-cost usage. For organizations necessitating proprietary obfuscation and elevated rewrite guarantees, explicit closed-source commercial contracts are available.

2.q: What is the speed of initial commercial evaluation?
2.a: Extremely high-velocity. Using our customized Node CLI toolchain alongside the precise technical specification, a junior engineer can stand up an autonomous local Minimum Viable Product (MVP) instance within single-digit minutes.

0.q: How wide is the tolerance for commercial scaling?
0.a: Designed heavily on micro-component paradigms, structural load capacity maps seamlessly from zero-demand Free Tiers dynamically up to Enterprise thresholds serving multi-million monthly requests, entirely configured via dashboard constraints.

1.q: How does subscription volatility affect standard accounting?
1.a: We operate utilizing precise, second-level structural logging of resources and API throughput. Shifting constraints instantly reconciles against the accounting layer—either refunding prorated differentials or issuing automatic credits. There is absolutely no tier-freeze period.

2.q: What processing infrastructure isolates payment vectors?
2.a: Global cash routing fundamentally defers to Stripe server interfaces, guaranteeing strict PCI-DSS telemetry and processing integrity. Enterprise deployments may integrate private financial audit pipelines governed by custom SLA commitments.

0.q: Which fundamental intelligence abstractions are supported natively?
0.a: The primary interaction logic dictates native interoperability over OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini standard specifications. This yields massive flexibility to hot-swap reasoning endpoints efficiently via variable mapping with zero degradation to the upstream commercial logic.

1.q: How is the risk of database obfuscation addressed?
1.a: Implementation defaults intrinsically deploy Postgres Row-Level Security (RLS) policies tightly coupled with our serverless Tenant Resolution Routing primitives. This ensures hard partitions actively prevent critical application-level data contamination and execution overlap.

2.q: Are there architectural restrictions on self-managed deployments?
2.a: Absolutely none. The topology is fully decoupled. If the environment executes independent Node.js runtimes alongside healthy PostgreSQL clusters, full functionality is inherently preserved.

0.q: What protocols determine the perimeter's mechanical defense?
0.a: Mechanisms execute mandatory TLS encryption through transmission, deterministic hashing algorithms for secrets mapping, and the ubiquitous recording of mutation events written strictly into internal time-series tracking ledgers.

1.q: Does the topology respect major international privacy statutes?
1.a: Yes, profoundly. Business modules supply out-of-the-box algorithmic implementations targeting consent withdrawal states, hard-deletion logic, and deep export queries conforming optimally to the GDPR and localized regulatory frameworks.

2.q: What executes upon an anomalous catastrophic incident?
2.a: Automated sentinels instantly alert core engineering vectors who force circuit blocks and implement swift triage. Governed by an advanced resolution handbook, fully transparent Incident Postmortems are universally disseminated within an absolute 72-hour window.

0.q: How is operational bottleneck troubleshooting resolved?
0.a: Initial triage vectors target the rigorously maintained and peer-reviewed documentation matrix and verified community interactions. Procuring a standard or enterprise-level license decrypts access to private escalation queues resolving through direct internal engineering nodes.

1.q: Do you extend physical or specialized environmental integration operations?
1.a: This falls under our bespoke premium execution tier for upper-echelon corporate conglomerates. Our most senior architects deploy outly to perform code auditing against legacy architecture, manage delicate cloud relocations, and validate highly isolated network partitions.

faq.ctaDescription: Whether validating a specific API behavior schema or executing long-term integration agreements, interface directly with the engineering hierarchy.

privacy.title: Privacy & Information Defense Protocol — Nebutra
privacy.description: Extensively documenting precisely how the infrastructure mechanics govern user autonomy and machine data isolation.
privacy.heading: Information Protection Directives
privacy.intro: At Nebutra ("Company," "we," "us," or "our"), we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website, applications, and services (collectively, the "Services").

youProvide.title: 1.1 Information You Provide
youProvide.intro: We collect information you directly provide to us, including:

0.label: Account Information
0.desc: Name, email address, password, and organization details when you create an account.

1.label: Profile Information
1.desc: Profile picture, job title, company name, and other optional information.

2.label: Payment Information
2.desc: Billing address and payment method details (processed securely through Stripe).

3.label: Communications
3.desc: Messages, feedback, and other communications you send to us.

4.label: Content
4.desc: Any content you create, upload, or store using our Services.

automatic.title: 1.2 Information Collected Automatically
automatic.intro: When you use our Services, we automatically collect certain information:

0.label: Device Information
0.desc: Device type, operating system, browser type, and unique device identifiers.

1.label: Usage Information
1.desc: Pages viewed, features used, actions taken, and time spent on Services.

2.label: Log Data
2.desc: IP address, access times, referring URLs, and system activity logs.

3.label: Location Information
3.desc: General location based on IP address (we do not collect precise geolocation).

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: We use the information we collect to:

0.label: Provide Services
0.desc: Operate, maintain, and improve our Services.

1.label: Process Transactions
1.desc: Handle payments, billing, and related operations.

2.label: Communicate
2.desc: Send service announcements, updates, and marketing communications (with consent).

3.label: Personalize
3.desc: Customize your experience and provide relevant recommendations.

4.label: Analyze
4.desc: Understand usage patterns and improve our Services.

5.label: Protect
5.desc: Detect, prevent, and respond to fraud, abuse, and security incidents.

howWeShare.title: 3. How We Share Your Information
howWeShare.intro: We may share your information in the following circumstances:

serviceProviders.title: 3.1 Service Providers
serviceProviders.intro: We share information with third-party vendors who provide services on our behalf, including:

3.label: Analytics
3.desc: PostHog, Vercel Analytics for usage insights

businessTransfers.title: 3.2 Business Transfers
businessTransfers.content: If we are involved in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction.

legalRequirements.title: 3.3 Legal Requirements
legalRequirements.content: We may disclose information when required by law, legal process, or government request, or to protect our rights, privacy, safety, or property.

accessPortability.title: 4.1 Access and Portability
accessPortability.content: You can access your personal information through your account settings and request a copy of your data in a portable format.

correction.title: 4.2 Correction
correction.content: You can update your account information at any time through the dashboard.

deletion.title: 4.3 Deletion
deletion.content: You can request deletion of your account and associated data through settings or by contacting us.

marketing.title: 4.4 Marketing Communications
marketing.content: You can opt out of marketing emails by clicking "unsubscribe" in any marketing email or updating your preferences.

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information, including:

items.0: Encryption of data in transit (TLS) and at rest
items.1: Regular security assessments and penetration testing
items.3: Monitoring and logging of system activity

ccpa.title: 6. California Privacy Rights (CCPA)
ccpa.intro: If you are a California resident, you have specific rights regarding your personal information:

0.label: Right to Know
0.desc: Request disclosure of information we collect, use, and share.

1.label: Right to Delete
1.desc: Request deletion of your personal information.

2.label: Right to Opt-Out
2.desc: Opt out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell your data).

3.label: Right to Non-Discrimination
3.desc: We will not discriminate against you for exercising your rights.

gdpr.title: 7. European Privacy Rights (GDPR)
gdpr.intro: If you are in the EEA, UK, or Switzerland, you have additional rights under GDPR:

0.label: Legal Basis
0.desc: We process your data based on contract performance, legitimate interests, or consent.

1.label: Rights
1.desc: Access, rectification, erasure, portability, restriction, and objection.

2.label: DPO
2.desc: You can contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@nebutra.com.

contactUs.title: 8. Contact Us
contactUs.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

architecture.title: Transparent architecture, no black boxes.
architecture.description: Nebutra Sailor is engineered with a hyper-modular Turborepo structure, giving you complete ownership of your entire software lifecycle.

database.title: PostgreSQL + Prisma v7
database.desc: Fully typed ORM with Row-Level Security (RLS) policies baked in natively.

auth.title: Clerk Multi-Tenant / Custom Identity
auth.desc: SOC2-ready authentication gateway supporting B2B organization switching and RBAC.

pricing.title: Accelerate your development cycle.
pricing.description: Choose a commercial license that aligns with your engineering velocity and enterprise scale.

solo.desc: Perfect for One-Person Companies (OPC) executing rapid MVP iterations under the AGPL license.
solo.f3: Full SaaS stack: Auth, Payments, Organizations, API, Admin UI, Email, i18n, Background Jobs, Storage & more
solo.f4: Marketing features: Blog, Landing page, SEO, Analytics

faq.title: Evaluating the stack.
faq.description: Detailed engineering answers to accelerate your architectural decisions.

q1.q: Why Turborepo over a standard Next.js app?
q1.a: Turborepo isolates your UI components, database schemas, and shared utilities, allowing unparalleled scale when your SaaS outgrows a single frontend application.

q2.a: We use Clerk's B2B organizational structure deeply integrated with Prisma middleware to ensure strict row-level isolation between organizations.

q3.q: Can I swap Clerk for Supabase Auth?
q3.a: Absolutely. Our authentication layer is abstracted via @nebutra/identity, meaning you can hot-swap identity providers with minimal refactoring.

q4.q: Do I need to pay for updates?
q4.a: No, commercial licenses include lifetime access to the repository and all future updates and architectural improvements.

cta.title: Stop configuring. Start building.
cta.description: Initialize your scalable SaaS architecture locally within 3 minutes using the Nebutra CLI.

multiTenant.title: Native Row-Level Security
multiTenant.desc: Every database query is strictly scoped by the current tenant context.

aiGateway.title: Universal AI Gateway
aiGateway.desc: Seamlessly route prompts to OpenAI, Anthropic, or open-source models.

rbac.title: Granular Access Control
rbac.desc: Define admin, member, and viewer roles with zero boilerplate.

billing.title: Stripe Billing Infrastructure
billing.desc: Metered usage, subscription webhooks, and self-serve customer portals.

workflow.title: From zero to production in record time.

step1.title: 1. Clone
step1.desc: Instantly clone the Nebutra monorepo and run pnpm install.

step2.title: 2. Configure
step2.desc: Set up Prisma, Clerk, and Stripe via the interactive CLI in minutes.

step3.title: 3. Build
step3.desc: Focus entirely on your unique SaaS features and UI rather than boilerplate.

step4.title: 4. Deploy
step4.desc: Push to Vercel and AWS for instant global distribution.

speedometer.subtitle: TIME TO MARKET
speedometer.comparison: 99% faster than building an internal platform team.

t1.quote: Nebutra saved us six months of platform engineering. We shipped our MVP on day 10.
t1.author: Sarah Chen

t2.quote: The Turborepo setup is phenomenal. Testing, linting, and building are instantly cached.
t2.author: Marcus Dev

t3.quote: Finally, a boilerplate that doesn't feel like a black box. The code quality is immaculate.
t3.author: Emma Founder

productDemo.title: Experience the real-time velocity.
productDemo.description: Get a feel for the command-line interface, Stripe webhook tunneling, and local multi-tenant database provisioning.

analytics.label: Live Telemetry
analytics.desc: Stream production usage data straight into your terminal.

billing.label: Billing Events
billing.desc: Watch Stripe webhooks execute via local tunneling.

workspaces.label: Workspace Init
workspaces.desc: Provision isolated B2B PostgreSQL schemas instantly.

harness.headline: Engineering that enforces itself.
harness.subheadline: Architecture tests, governance ratchets, and 15 CI workflows ensure code quality can only improve — never regress.
harness.card1Desc: 7 property-based tests with fast-check enforce dependency flow, token usage, WCAG contrast ratios, API version prefixes, and story coverage.
harness.card2Desc: Token budgets that only tighten: zero raw color classes on landing page, oklch floor 120+, hex ceiling 40, motion imports whitelisted to 2 files.
harness.card3Desc: CodeQL SAST, Gitleaks, cosign signing, SBOM/SLSA provenance, Lighthouse ≥0.95, OpenAPI backward compatibility, k6 load tests, Chromatic visual regression.

hero.description: Nebutra는 풀스택 SaaS 플랫폼입니다. AI, 빌링, 멀티테넌시, 관측 가능성, 보안이 처음부터 내장되어 있습니다. 바퀴를 다시 발명하지 마세요.

sections.ai_f1_desc: Route requests to GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4, Gemini 3.1, or your own fine-tuned models. Streaming, vision, and function calling supported out of the box.
sections.ai_f2_desc: Generate and store vector embeddings with pgvector. Power semantic search, RAG pipelines, and recommendation engines.
sections.ai_f3_desc: Track token consumption per tenant per billing period. Set per-plan quotas and auto-notify on 80% / 100% burn.
sections.multi_f1_desc: Row-level security in Postgres ensures tenants can never access each other's data — enforced at the database layer, not just the application.
sections.multi_f2_desc: Switch auth providers via preset config. Clerk for managed, Better Auth for self-hosted. Phone + SMS login for China market via Aliyun/Tencent Cloud.
sections.multi_f3_desc: When a new organisation signs up via Clerk, we auto-generate their first API key and send a branded welcome email — zero manual steps.
sections.dx_f1_desc: SHA-256 hashed keys with prefix display (nbtr_live_…). Shown in plaintext exactly once on creation — security without friction.
sections.dx_f2_desc: Pass an Idempotency-Key header and any POST request becomes safe to retry. Redis-backed, 24-hour cache, IETF draft compliant.
sections.dx_f3_desc: REST/OpenAPI for public APIs, oRPC for type-safe frontend calls, tRPC for T3-stack compatibility. All protocols share the same Zod contracts and middleware stack. Enable per protocol via preset config.
sections.billing_f1_desc: Choose your payment provider: Stripe for global enterprise, LemonSqueezy for indie devs, Polar for OSS, or Alipay/WeChat Pay for China market. One-click checkout and self-serve billing portal.
sections.billing_f2_desc: Real-time Redis counters track API calls and token usage per tenant. Requests are gated at the gateway when limits are hit.
sections.billing_f3_desc: Stripe subscription events automatically update org plans in your database via Inngest — no cron jobs, no polling.
sections.rel_f1_desc: Every Python microservice uses a CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN circuit breaker with exponential backoff and jitter — no cascading failures.
sections.rel_f2_desc: Event handlers that exhaust 3 retry attempts land in the DLQ. Replay them individually from the admin API without redeploying.
sections.rel_f3_desc: Multi-window Google SRE-style alerts fire at 14.4×, 6×, and 3× burn rates before your error budget is exhausted.
sections.sec_f1_desc: Strict-dynamic Content Security Policy with per-request nonces generated in Clerk middleware — no unsafe-inline anywhere.
sections.sec_f2_desc: OWASP Core Rule Set in DetectionOnly mode on every ingress. Rate limiting at 30 RPS with burst tolerance via nginx annotations.
sections.sec_f3_desc: Every release generates a CycloneDX software bill of materials and SLSA provenance attestation, uploaded to the GitHub Release.
sections.obs_f1_desc: Distributed traces flow from Next.js → Hono → Python microservices via OTLP. Exported to Jaeger (dev) and Grafana Tempo (prod).
sections.obs_f2_desc: 32-panel platform overview: SLO availability, error budget remaining, HPA saturation, pod restarts, and CPU throttling.
sections.obs_f3_desc: Server-side and client-side errors captured with tenant context, request ID, and trace ID for cross-system correlation.
sections.data_f1_desc: Events land in ClickHouse for fast analytical queries. dbt transforms raw events into gold-layer growth metrics visible in the dashboard.
sections.data_f2_desc: Track signups → activations → conversions with cohort-level attribution. Revenue per active user calculated from the gold layer.
sections.data_f3_desc: High-throughput event ingestion service decouples your application from your data warehouse. Schema validation at the edge.
sections.infra_f1_desc: Main branch changes are automatically reconciled to the cluster. Self-heal reverts manual kubectl edits. Sync windows enforce safe deploy hours.
sections.infra_f2_desc: Transaction-mode PgBouncer in front of Supabase handles 1,000 app connections on 20 Postgres connections. HA with 2 replicas.
sections.infra_f3_desc: HPA scales on CPU/memory. VPA runs in Off mode providing right-sizing recommendations. KEDA custom metrics planned for v2.

description.ideas: We are currently crafting an incredible geek-driven experience for this section. It will be launched alongside the next major architecture pipeline update.
description.opc: The hub for the ultimate OPC developers is being built. Subscribe to our release channels to be notified of the upcoming launch.
description.roadmap: 인프라 기반부터 엔터프라이즈 규모까지 — 제품 단계, 버전 마일스톤, 투자 유치 비전.

blogShowcase.title: 엔지니어링 인사이트
blogShowcase.subtitle: SaaS 아키텍처, AI 인프라, 프로덕션 엔지니어링에 대한 심층 분석.

useCases.title: One foundation. Infinite possibilities.
useCases.description: Nebutra Sailor powers the next generation of SaaS products across global markets.

opc.title: Leading AI-Native & One-Person Company (OPC) Ecosystem Hub
opc.desc: Future AI products require ecosystems, not silos. Designed with the OPC philosophy to provide standardized plugin structures connecting creators with developer networks.

ip.title: Personal IP Growth & Portfolio Matrix
ip.desc: Establish a world-class founder presence. High-conversion blog, portfolio, and profile templates optimized for personal brand monetization.

multimodal.title: Innovative Multimodal AI SaaS
multimodal.desc: Launch complete Chatbot, Text-to-Image, or Video generation SaaS with integrated Vercel AI SDK, streaming, and prompt gateways.

enterprise.title: Modern Enterprise Context (CN)
enterprise.desc: Tailored for the domestic market with ultra-fast local CDN support, WeChat ecosystem integration readiness, and localized compliance.

export.title: Global Software Export Landing Pages
export.desc: Designed for cross-border SaaS. Built-in multi-currency Stripe checkout, next-intl i18n routing, and GDPR compliance.

design.title: Leading Modern Component Library System
design.desc: A beautiful, token-driven architecture using Radix + framer-motion. Perfect for teams building their own opinionated UI libraries.

edam.title: Enterprise Digital Asset Management
edam.desc: Structured data lakes and complex dashboard topologies utilizing scalable PostgreSQL architectures and granular RBAC.

seoGeo.title: SEO & GEO 성장 엔진
seoGeo.desc: 전통적 검색을 넘어서. 내장 SEO 기반과 생성 엔진 최적화로 Google과 ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini 등 AI 검색 엔진에서 동시에 발견됩니다.

agentic.headline: AI 코딩 에이전트를 위해 설계.
agentic.subheadline: 모든 파일, 모든 규칙, 모든 테스트가 Claude Code, Cursor, Codex가 전체 코드베이스를 이해하고 자율적으로 배포할 수 있도록 설계되었습니다.
agentic.card1Desc: CLAUDE.md가 컴포넌트 규칙, 토큰 거버넌스, 임포트 경계를 제공—에이전트가 추측할 필요 없습니다.
agentic.card2Desc: 7개의 속성 테스트가 의존성 흐름, 토큰 사용, WCAG 대비를 강제—에이전트는 불변성을 깨뜨릴 수 없습니다.
agentic.card3Desc: 에이전트가 컨텍스트를 읽고, 코드를 작성하고, 테스트를 실행하고, CI를 통과—프롬프트에서 프로덕션까지 수동 개입 없이.
agentic.compTraditional: AI 추측 → 코드 손상 → 수동 수정
agentic.compSailor: AI 규칙 읽기 → 제약 준수 → CI 검증 → 배포

designSystem.headline: 4단계 디자인 거버넌스.
designSystem.subheadline: 브랜드 프리미티브에서 런타임 토큰, 멀티 테마 엔진, 거버넌스 컴포넌트까지 — shadcn + Tailwind 그 이상.
designSystem.card1Desc: Geist 정렬 시맨틱 스케일: 배경(1-2), 상태(3-5), 테두리(6-8), 채우기(9-10), 텍스트(11-12).
designSystem.card2Desc: oklch 색공간을 사용한 6개 테마 프리셋, color-mix()로 호버/활성 상태 파생. Display-P3 광색역 + sRGB 폴백.
designSystem.card3Desc: Chromatic이 모든 픽셀 변경을 감지. Storybook이 모든 컴포넌트를 문서화. 아키텍처 테스트가 Story 커버리지를 강제.
designSystem.card4Desc: 래칫 예산: hex 상한, oklch 하한, 원시 색상 클래스 제한. CI에서 브랜드 드리프트 감지.
designSystem.card5Desc: Fumadocs 기반 디자인 문서 사이트. 이중 언어 컴포넌트 API 문서, 토큰 갤러리, 레이아웃 패턴 가이드.

seoGeo.headline: 사람에게 발견되다. AI에게 인용되다.
seoGeo.subheadline: 모든 페이지에 프로덕션급 SEO와 생성 엔진 최적화가 내장되어 있습니다. Google, Perplexity, ChatGPT Search, Bing Copilot에 바로 노출됩니다.
seoGeo.card1Desc: JSON-LD 스키마, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, 정규 URL, XML 사이트맵을 콘텐츠 모델에서 자동 생성. 수동 설정 없음.
seoGeo.card2Desc: 시맨틱 HTML5, FAQ 스키마, HowTo 마크업 및 AI 검색 엔진이 답변 생성 시 선호하는 인용 가능 형식.
seoGeo.card3Desc: next-intl은 로케일 기반 라우팅을 사용하여 7개 언어에 대한 hreflang 대체 항목을 자동 생성합니다. 각 언어는 자체 사이트맵 항목을 가집니다.
seoGeo.card4Desc: 서버 컴포넌트, 동적 임포트, 이미지 최적화 및 엣지 캐싱으로 99+ Lighthouse 점수 달성. 모바일에서 LCP 1.2초 이하.
seoGeo.card5Desc: 구조화된 데이터, 권위 있는 콘텐츠 패턴 및 E-E-A-T 신호. Perplexity, ChatGPT Search 및 Google SGE가 인용 소스를 결정할 때 사용.
seoGeo.card6Desc: ISR + 300+ Vercel PoP상의 엣지 미들웨어. 지역별 타겟팅 콘텐츠, 다중 통화 가격 책정 및 엣지에서의 로케일 인식 라우팅.
seoGeo.compTraditional: 수동 메타 태그 → 느린 크롤링 → AI 검색에서 보이지 않음
seoGeo.compSailor: 자동화된 스키마 → 즉시 인덱싱 → AI 엔진에서 인용 → 글로벌 도달

notFound.title: 페이지를 찾을 수 없습니다
notFound.desc: 찾으시는 페이지가 삭제되었거나 일시적으로 사용할 수 없습니다.

impact.hero_subtitle: We are not here to merely hatch unicorns. We are here to construct the mother-engine that continuously fissions them.
impact.phil_desc: Traditional behemoths fall into the scale curse—relying on human wave attrition and bureaucratic layering to survive. Nebutra terminates this old order. Our social-level calling is to democratize entrepreneurship into a lightweight, reliable pathway, making it the absolute default career choice for top digital minds.
impact.infra_desc: Nebutra is not a duct-tape solution of existing tools; it is a full-lifecycle creator engine running from inspiration to monopoly.
impact.infra_1_desc: Transcend typical boilerplates with 50+ pre-integrated modules. Ship complete enterprise models within a week.
impact.infra_2_desc: Utilize algorithmic distribution over paid acquisition. Expose your MVP to a relentless feedback loop on day zero.
impact.infra_3_desc: Destroy the JD/CV paradigm. Matchmake solo creators entirely via absolute Proof of Work and semantic compatibility.
impact.infra_4_desc: Funding secured not by pitch decks nor networking, but strictly via trailing MRR graphs and code delivery velocity.
impact.route_desc: Nebutra constructs a global super-neural network piercing through physical and hierarchical blockades. It aligns Capital directly to Code, Vision flawlessly to Execution, and establishes Trust upon immutable architectural deliveries rather than hollow prestige.
impact.org_desc: Upon immense scale, we fundamentally reject solving problems via "middle management layering". In Nebutra’s ecosystem, Code is Law. Automate all operational procedures via AI Agents, reserving human intellect strictly for creation and strategic vision.

hero.title: 듀얼 <hl>라이선스</hl> 모델
hero.description: Nebutra-Sailor는 AGPL-3.0 기반 오픈소스입니다. 클로즈드 소스 제품을 개발하는 팀을 위한 상용 라이선스도 함께 제공합니다.

agpl.title: AGPL-3.0
agpl.subtitle: 오픈소스
agpl.description: 오픈소스 프로젝트, 학술 연구, 개인 학습용

features.freeKey: 가입 시 무료 라이선스 키 발급

commercial.title: 상용 라이선스
commercial.subtitle: 스타트업 & 엔터프라이즈
commercial.description: 스타트업, 에이전시, 팀(2인 이상), 상용 SaaS 제품용

whyAgpl.a: AGPL은 템플릿 개선 사항이 오픈소스로 유지되도록 보장합니다. 상용 라이선스는 기업을 위해 이러한 의무를 해제합니다.

soloFree.a: 네, 완전히 무료입니다. /get-license에서 가입하고 키를 받아 제품을 개발하세요. 어떠한 조건도 없습니다.

opcDefinition.a: 풀타임 환산 1명 이하입니다. 첫 직원을 채용하면 Startup 라이선스가 필요합니다(저희가 안내드립니다).

upgrade.a: 물론입니다. 커뮤니티 프로필이 그대로 이어지니, 준비가 되면 Startup 라이선스를 구매하시면 됩니다.

contributions.a: 모든 기여에는 CLA 서명이 필요합니다. CONTRIBUTING.md를 참고하세요.

meta.title: 라이선스 — Nebutra
meta.description: 듀얼 라이선스 모델: AGPL-3.0 오픈소스 또는 상용 라이선스.

changelogMeta.title: 업데이트 로그 — Nebutra
changelogMeta.description: 모든 릴리스에 끊임없는 디테일을 담아 전달합니다.

roadmapMeta.title: 메타 유니콘 로드맵 — Nebutra
roadmapMeta.description: Nebutra Creator Engine 생태계의 다섯 가지 진화 단계.

blogMeta.title: 블로그 — Nebutra
blogMeta.description: Nebutra 팀의 엔지니어링 인사이트, 제품 업데이트, SaaS 모범 사례.

getLicenseMeta.title: 라이선스 받기 — Nebutra
getLicenseMeta.description: Nebutra 커뮤니티에 참여하세요. 2분이면 무료 라이선스를 받을 수 있습니다.
